alphaxiv.description: arXiv literature search — semantic search, full-text search, paper Q&A, code repo access
alphaxiv.auth: OAuth 2.0 — run: claude mcp add --transport http alphaxiv https://api.alphaxiv.org/mcp/v1
alphaxiv.fallback: Use WebSearch with INSPIRE (inspirehep.net/api) or direct arXiv queries.

lep-corpus.description: LEP experiment corpus — literature search and cross-experiment comparisons
lep-corpus.fallback: Use WebSearch/WebFetch for literature queries. Cross-experiment comparisons unavailable.
